category_sources: source_facts.description describes Genders as a static cluster configuration database for cluster management.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies genders; official repository naming supports the display name Genders.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/chaos/genders, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a static cluster configuration database; source_facts.executables lists nodeattr, consistent with node attribute querying for cluster management.
